subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 255729682 is not a GRB
body:
P. N. Bhat (UAH)
reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 255729682 at
20:01:20.03 UT on 07 February 2009, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to
SGR 1547-5408."
